title: DOJ Drops Criminal Probe of Former Fed Chair Powell
summary: The Department of Justice has dropped its criminal probe into former Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell.
charlotte_impact: This removes a potential obstacle for future nominations to the Federal Reserve leadership.

title: Iranian FM Visits Pakistan Amid US Talks Resumption Efforts

title: HPV Vaccine's Importance for Men Highlighted in New Study
summary: A new study emphasizes the importance of the HPV vaccine for men, showing a significant reduction in HPV-related cancer risk.
charlotte_impact: Increased vaccination rates in men can lead to a substantial decrease in HPV-related cancers.

title: Hezbollah Defiant Despite Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Extension
